description_long: This is a modern, rectangular sofa with a minimalist design, featuring a low profile and clean, straight lines. The sofa is upholstered in a dark, likely black or charcoal fabric, giving it a sleek and contemporary appearance suitable for urban environments. It has two large seat cushions and two matching backrest cushions, both of which appear to be attached and uniform in size. The armrests are straight, boxy, and of equal height to the backrest, providing a cohesive silhouette. The sofa stands on six slender, metal legs that are evenly spaced for stability and have a subtle, unobtrusive look. The overall design is functional and stylish, making it ideal for public spaces, lobbies, or modern outdoor urban settings.
description: A sleek, modern black sofa with straight armrests, two large seat and back cushions, and six slim metal legs. Its minimalist design and dark upholstery make it suitable for contemporary urban spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the sofa's two large seat and back cushions, straight armrests, and the full width of the seating area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the boxy armrest, the thickness of the seat and back cushions, and the slim profile of the legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, flat backrest and the even spacing of the six metal legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, showing the armrest and cushion thickness from the other end.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, uniform seat cushions and two matching backrest cushions, all attached and spanning the full width of the sofa.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, boxy armrests at each end, equal in height to the backrest, with a simple, padded design and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Six slender, straight metal legs, evenly spaced with two at each end and two central supports, featuring a minimalist, exposed style.
attribute_backrest_type: Low, straight, continuous backrest with two attached cushions, matching the seat cushions in width and style.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid, dark-colored fabric with a smooth, matte finish and no visible decorative stitching or pattern.
